title: All You Need Is Love
album: At Home with The Beatles - EP
why_this_song: All You Need Is Love by The Beatles (1967) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 47 times; first heard in: "All you need is love"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "There's nothing you can do that can't be done"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "There's nothing you can do that can't be done"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "It's easy"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "It's easy"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "need" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "need" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "nothing" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "nothing" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: "All You Need Is Love" was released in 1967. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "All You Need Is Love" foi lançada em 1967. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "All You Need Is Love" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "All You Need Is Love" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
